main.name: Chase Blum
main.occupation: Business Intelligence Analytst at Gallup Inc.
main.bio: Who am I? Well, professionally I am Business Intelligence Analyst at Gallup Inc. but personally I am a methodical problem solver who has a hard time taking no for an answer. I love solving large ambigous questions with a high degree of detail and thought. In myself and others I am someone who values intentional actions, a commitment to excellence, and a demeanor that never makes collaboration a chore. In my freetime, I enjoy phsycial fitness, exploring my city, reading and sailing.

education.description: Bachelor of Science - International Business Club (President). Big Red Investment Club, UNL Initialize, UNL Thrist Project, UNL Sailing Team (Captian & President), Sigma Chi Fraternity (Vice President)

work.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
work.description: Support business leaders with data, projections, and recommendations for business strategy.

work.title: Associate Financial Analyst
work.description: Compiled and delivered financial reports in ERP system for leadership.

work.title: Project Management Intern
work.description: Project managed an internal software feature release over the course of 6 months.

projects.title: Client Prospecting Tool
projects.description: A business development tool that assesses all public companies and scores them by their financail metrics within their respective industry. Companies with a higher score are then sent over to sales leadership in their respective industry
projects.tags: Business Development, Data Analytics, Regression Analysis

projects.title: Business Territory Calculator
projects.description: A dashboard created to view entire business & business opportunity without territory lines. Used to reassess territories and accounts for all outbound sales efforts.
projects.tags: Sales Operations, Power Bi, Territory Analysis

projects.title: New Solution Offering Pricing Methodology
projects.description: An in depth look into the calculation and rigorous methodology applied when introducing two new products to the market place.
projects.tags: Competitive Intelligence, Cost Based Pricing, Product Release

projects.title: ERP Reporting in FAW, OTBI, & OBIEE
projects.description: A look into the type of reporting responsibilities in my role, and the different systems I am familar with.
projects.category: Animating the Translation of a Phiastos Disc
